results.question: Show annual revenue, total cost, gross profit, gross margin percentage, and total order lines by fiscal year. Return columns: Fiscal Year, total_revenue, total_cost, gross_profit, gross_margin_pct, total_order_lines. Sort by Fiscal Year ascending.
results.sql: SELECT d."Fiscal Year" AS "Fiscal Year", SUM(s."Sales Amount") AS total_revenue, SUM(s."Total Product Cost") AS total_cost, SUM(s."Sales Amount") - SUM(s."Total Product Cost") AS gross_profit, ((SUM(s."Sales Amount") - SUM(s."Total Product Cost")) / SUM(s."Sales Amount")) * 100 AS gross_margin_pct, COUNT(*) AS total_order_lines FROM "Sales" s JOIN "Date" d ON s."OrderDateKey" = d."DateKey" GROUP BY d."Fiscal Year" ORDER BY d."Fiscal Year" ASC

results.question: Compare the Reseller and Internet sales channels showing total revenue, revenue share percentage, number of distinct sales orders, order lines, average line amount, and gross margin percentage. Return columns: Channel, total_revenue, revenue_share_pct, total_orders, order_lines, avg_line_amount, gross_margin_pct. Sort by total_revenue descending.
results.sql:
WITH channel_sales AS (
  SELECT
    so."Channel",
    SUM(s."Sales Amount") AS total_revenue,
    COUNT(DISTINCT so."Sales Order") AS total_orders,
    COUNT(*) AS order_lines,
    AVG(s."Sales Amount") AS avg_line_amount,
    (SUM(s."Sales Amount") - SUM(s."Total Product Cost")) / SUM(s."Sales Amount") * 100 AS gross_margin_pct
  FROM "Sales" s
  JOIN "Sales_Order" so ON s."SalesOrderLineKey" = so."SalesOrderLineKey"
  GROUP BY so."Channel"
),
total_rev AS (
  SELECT SUM(total_revenue) AS overall_total FROM channel_sales
)
SELECT
  cs."Channel",
  cs.total_revenue,
  cs.total_revenue / tr.overall_total * 100 AS revenue_share_pct,
  cs.total_orders,
  cs.order_lines,
  cs.avg_line_amount,
  cs.gross_margin_pct
FROM channel_sales cs
CROSS JOIN total_rev tr
ORDER BY cs.total_revenue DESC;

results.question: Show revenue, revenue share percentage, units sold, gross profit, and gross margin percentage by product category. Return columns: Category, revenue, revenue_share_pct, units_sold, gross_profit, gross_margin_pct. Sort by revenue descending.
results.sql: WITH totals AS ( SELECT SUM("Sales Amount") AS total_revenue FROM "Sales" ) SELECT p."Category", SUM(s."Sales Amount") AS revenue, (SUM(s."Sales Amount") / ANY_VALUE(t.total_revenue)) * 100 AS revenue_share_pct, SUM(s."Order Quantity") AS units_sold, SUM(s."Sales Amount" - s."Total Product Cost") AS gross_profit, (SUM(s."Sales Amount" - s."Total Product Cost") / SUM(s."Sales Amount")) * 100 AS gross_margin_pct FROM "Sales" s JOIN "Product" p ON s."ProductKey" = p."ProductKey" CROSS JOIN totals t GROUP BY p."Category" ORDER BY revenue DESC;

results.question: List the top 10 products by revenue, showing product name, category, subcategory, revenue, units sold, gross profit, and margin percentage. Return columns: Product, Category, Subcategory, revenue, units_sold, gross_profit, margin_pct. Sort by revenue descending, limit to 10 rows.
results.sql: SELECT p."Product" AS "Product", p."Category" AS "Category", p."Subcategory" AS "Subcategory", SUM(s."Sales Amount") AS "revenue", SUM(s."Order Quantity") AS "units_sold", SUM(s."Sales Amount") - SUM(s."Total Product Cost") AS "gross_profit", ((SUM(s."Sales Amount") - SUM(s."Total Product Cost")) / SUM(s."Sales Amount")) * 100 AS "margin_pct" FROM "Sales" s JOIN "Product" p ON s."ProductKey" = p."ProductKey" GROUP BY p."Product", p."Category", p."Subcategory" ORDER BY "revenue" DESC LIMIT 10;

results.question: Show revenue and units sold broken down by territory group, country, region, and fiscal year. Return columns: Group, Country, Region, Fiscal Year, revenue, units_sold. Sort by Group, Country, Region, then Fiscal Year all ascending.
results.sql: SELECT st."Group" AS "Group", st."Country" AS "Country", st."Region" AS "Region", d."Fiscal Year" AS "Fiscal Year", SUM(s."Sales Amount") AS revenue, SUM(s."Order Quantity") AS units_sold FROM "Sales" s JOIN "Sales_Territory" st ON s."SalesTerritoryKey" = st."SalesTerritoryKey" JOIN "Date" d ON s."OrderDateKey" = d."DateKey" GROUP BY st."Group", st."Country", st."Region", d."Fiscal Year" ORDER BY st."Group" ASC, st."Country" ASC, st."Region" ASC, d."Fiscal Year" ASC

results.question: List the top 15 direct customers (excluding CustomerKey -1) by lifetime revenue, showing customer name, city, state/province, country/region, total orders, total line items, total units, lifetime revenue, and lifetime profit. Return columns: Customer, City, State-Province, Country-Region, total_orders, total_line_items, total_units, lifetime_revenue, lifetime_profit. Sort by lifetime_revenue descending, limit to 15 rows.
results.sql: SELECT c."Customer", c."City", c."State-Province", c."Country-Region", COUNT(DISTINCT so."Sales Order") AS total_orders, COUNT(*) AS total_line_items, SUM(s."Order Quantity") AS total_units, SUM(s."Sales Amount") AS lifetime_revenue, SUM(s."Sales Amount" - s."Total Product Cost") AS lifetime_profit FROM "Sales" s INNER JOIN "Sales_Order" so ON s."SalesOrderLineKey" = so."SalesOrderLineKey" INNER JOIN "Customer" c ON s."CustomerKey" = c."CustomerKey" WHERE so."Channel" = 'Internet' AND c."CustomerKey" != -1 GROUP BY c."Customer", c."City", c."State-Province", c."Country-Region" ORDER BY lifetime_revenue DESC LIMIT 15

results.question: For the Reseller channel only, show reseller count, total revenue, revenue per reseller, gross profit, and margin percentage by business type. Return columns: Business Type, reseller_count, total_revenue, revenue_per_reseller, gross_profit, margin_pct. Sort by total_revenue descending.
results.sql: WITH agg AS ( SELECT r."Business Type", COUNT(DISTINCT r."ResellerKey") AS reseller_count, SUM(s."Sales Amount") AS total_revenue, SUM(s."Sales Amount") - SUM(s."Total Product Cost") AS gross_profit FROM "Sales" s JOIN "Sales_Order" so ON s."SalesOrderLineKey" = so."SalesOrderLineKey" JOIN "Reseller" r ON s."ResellerKey" = r."ResellerKey" WHERE so."Channel" = 'Reseller' GROUP BY r."Business Type" ) SELECT "Business Type", reseller_count, total_revenue, total_revenue / reseller_count AS revenue_per_reseller, gross_profit, (gross_profit / total_revenue) * 100 AS margin_pct FROM agg ORDER BY total_revenue DESC

results.question: Show monthly revenue, number of distinct sales orders, and units sold for each month. Return columns: Month, MonthKey, monthly_revenue, orders, units_sold. Sort by MonthKey ascending.
results.sql: SELECT d."Month", d."MonthKey", SUM(s."Sales Amount") AS monthly_revenue, COUNT(DISTINCT so."Sales Order") AS orders, SUM(s."Order Quantity") AS units_sold FROM "Sales" s JOIN "Date" d ON s."OrderDateKey" = d."DateKey" JOIN "Sales_Order" so ON s."SalesOrderLineKey" = so."SalesOrderLineKey" GROUP BY d."Month", d."MonthKey" ORDER BY d."MonthKey" ASC

results.question: Show order lines, revenue, units sold, revenue per unit (total revenue ÷ total units sold), average list price per product in the subcategory, gross profit, and margin percentage for each product subcategory. Return columns: Subcategory, order_lines, revenue, units_sold, revenue_per_unit, avg_list_price, gross_profit, margin_pct. Sort by revenue descending.
results.sql:
WITH subcat_metrics AS (
SELECT
p."Subcategory",
COUNT(*) AS order_lines,
SUM(s."Sales Amount") AS revenue,
SUM(s."Order Quantity") AS units_sold,
SUM(s."Sales Amount") / SUM(s."Order Quantity") AS revenue_per_unit,
SUM(s."Sales Amount") - SUM(s."Total Product Cost") AS gross_profit
FROM "Sales" s
JOIN "Product" p ON s."ProductKey" = p."ProductKey"
GROUP BY p."Subcategory"
),
avg_list AS (
SELECT
"Subcategory",
AVG("List Price") AS avg_list_price
FROM "Product"
GROUP BY "Subcategory"
)
SELECT
m."Subcategory",
m.order_lines,
m.revenue,
m.units_sold,
m.revenue_per_unit,
a.avg_list_price,
m.gross_profit,
CASE WHEN m.revenue > 0 THEN (m.gross_profit / m.revenue) * 100 ELSE NULL END AS margin_pct
FROM subcat_metrics m
JOIN avg_list a ON m."Subcategory" = a."Subcategory"
ORDER BY m.revenue DESC

results.question: Show year-over-year revenue growth by channel and product category, comparing consecutive fiscal years. Return columns: Channel, Category, prior_year, prior_revenue, current_year, current_revenue, yoy_growth_pct. Sort by Channel, Category, then prior_year all ascending.
results.sql:
WITH agg AS (
  SELECT 
    so."Channel",
    p."Category",
    d."Fiscal Year",
    SUBSTRING(d."Fiscal Year" FROM 3 FOR 4)::BIGINT AS fy_num,
    SUM(s."Sales Amount") AS revenue
  FROM "Sales" s
  JOIN "Date" d ON s."OrderDateKey" = d."DateKey"
  JOIN "Sales_Order" so ON s."SalesOrderLineKey" = so."SalesOrderLineKey"
  JOIN "Product" p ON s."ProductKey" = p."ProductKey"
  GROUP BY so."Channel", p."Category", d."Fiscal Year"
)
SELECT 
  c."Channel",
  c."Category",
  p."Fiscal Year" AS prior_year,
  p.revenue AS prior_revenue,
  c."Fiscal Year" AS current_year,
  c.revenue AS current_revenue,
  ((c.revenue - p.revenue) / p.revenue * 100) AS yoy_growth_pct
FROM agg c
JOIN agg p ON c."Channel" = p."Channel" AND c."Category" = p."Category" AND c.fy_num = p.fy_num + 1
WHERE p.revenue <> 0
ORDER BY c."Channel" ASC, c."Category" ASC, p."Fiscal Year" ASC

results.question: Show the number of products, average list price, minimum list price, and maximum list price for each product category. Return columns: Category, product_count, avg_list_price, min_list_price, max_list_price. Sort by product_count descending.
results.sql: SELECT "Category", COUNT(*) AS product_count, AVG("List Price") AS avg_list_price, MIN("List Price") AS min_list_price, MAX("List Price") AS max_list_price FROM "Product" GROUP BY "Category" ORDER BY product_count DESC

results.question: Show the number of resellers, number of distinct business types, and number of distinct states/provinces for each country. Return columns: Country-Region, reseller_count, business_type_count, state_count. Sort by reseller_count descending.
results.sql: SELECT "Country-Region", COUNT(*) AS reseller_count, COUNT(DISTINCT "Business Type") AS business_type_count, COUNT(DISTINCT "State-Province") AS state_count FROM "Reseller" GROUP BY "Country-Region" ORDER BY reseller_count DESC

results.question: List all distinct product categories. Return columns: Category. Sort by Category ascending.
results.sql: SELECT DISTINCT "Category" FROM "Product" ORDER BY "Category" ASC

results.question: List all distinct product colors. Return columns: Color. Sort by Color ascending.
results.sql: SELECT DISTINCT "Color" FROM "Product" ORDER BY "Color" ASC;

results.question: List all sales territory regions and their countries. Return columns: Region, Country. Sort by Region ascending.
results.sql: SELECT "Region", "Country" FROM "Sales_Territory" ORDER BY "Region" ASC;

results.question: List all distinct fiscal years. Return columns: Fiscal Year. Sort by Fiscal Year ascending.
results.sql: SELECT DISTINCT "Fiscal Year" FROM "Date" ORDER BY "Fiscal Year" ASC;

results.question: List all distinct sales channels. Return columns: Channel. Sort by Channel ascending.
results.sql: SELECT DISTINCT "Channel" FROM "Sales_Order" ORDER BY "Channel" ASC;

results.question: List all distinct customer countries. Return columns: Country-Region. Sort by Country-Region ascending.
results.sql: SELECT DISTINCT "Country-Region" FROM "Customer" ORDER BY "Country-Region" ASC;

results.question: List all distinct reseller business types. Return columns: Business Type. Sort by Business Type ascending.
results.sql: SELECT DISTINCT "Business Type" FROM "Reseller" ORDER BY "Business Type" ASC

results.question: List all distinct fiscal quarters. Return columns: Fiscal Quarter. Sort by Fiscal Quarter ascending.
results.sql: SELECT DISTINCT "Fiscal Quarter" FROM "Date" ORDER BY "Fiscal Quarter" ASC

results.question: Show total revenue, units sold, revenue per unit (total revenue ÷ total units sold), average list price per product in the category, realized discount percentage versus that average list price, gross profit, and margin percentage by sales channel and product category. Return columns: Channel, Category, total_revenue, units_sold, revenue_per_unit, avg_list_price, realized_discount_pct, gross_profit, margin_pct. Sort by Channel ascending, then total_revenue descending.
results.sql: WITH AvgList AS ( SELECT "Category", AVG("List Price") AS avg_list_price FROM "Product" GROUP BY "Category" ), Main AS ( SELECT SO."Channel", P."Category", SUM(S."Sales Amount") AS total_revenue, SUM(S."Order Quantity") AS units_sold, SUM(S."Sales Amount") / SUM(S."Order Quantity") AS revenue_per_unit, MAX(AL.avg_list_price) AS avg_list_price, SUM(S."Sales Amount" - S."Total Product Cost") AS gross_profit, (SUM(S."Sales Amount" - S."Total Product Cost") / SUM(S."Sales Amount")) * 100 AS margin_pct FROM "Sales" S JOIN "Sales_Order" SO ON S."SalesOrderLineKey" = SO."SalesOrderLineKey" JOIN "Product" P ON S."ProductKey" = P."ProductKey" JOIN AvgList AL ON P."Category" = AL."Category" GROUP BY SO."Channel", P."Category" ) SELECT "Channel", "Category", total_revenue, units_sold, revenue_per_unit, avg_list_price, ((avg_list_price - revenue_per_unit) / avg_list_price) * 100 AS realized_discount_pct, gross_profit, margin_pct FROM Main ORDER BY "Channel" ASC, total_revenue DESC

results.question: Show quarter-over-quarter revenue growth by channel and product category, comparing consecutive fiscal quarters. Return columns: Channel, Category, prior_quarter, prior_revenue, current_quarter, current_revenue, qoq_growth_pct. Sort by Channel, Category, then prior_quarter all ascending.

For each product category, list the top 2 subcategories by revenue, showing revenue rank within the category, revenue, units sold, gross profit, and revenue share percentage within the category. Return columns: Category, revenue_rank, Subcategory, revenue, units_sold, gross_profit, category_revenue_share_pct. Sort by Category, revenue_rank, then Subcategory all ascending.
results.sql:
WITH aggregated AS (
SELECT
p."Category",
p."Subcategory",
SUM(s."Sales Amount") AS revenue,
SUM(s."Order Quantity") AS units_sold,
SUM(s."Sales Amount" - s."Total Product Cost") AS gross_profit
FROM "Sales" s
JOIN "Product" p ON s."ProductKey" = p."ProductKey"
GROUP BY p."Category", p."Subcategory"
),
ranked AS (
SELECT
"Category",
ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY "Category" ORDER BY revenue DESC, "Subcategory" ASC) AS revenue_rank,
"Subcategory",
revenue,
units_sold,
gross_profit,
(revenue / SUM(revenue) OVER (PARTITION BY "Category")) * 100 AS category_revenue_share_pct
FROM aggregated
)
SELECT * FROM ranked WHERE revenue_rank <= 2
ORDER BY "Category" ASC, revenue_rank ASC, "Subcategory" ASC

results.question: Within each sales channel, show revenue, revenue share percentage, cumulative revenue share percentage ordered by revenue descending, number of distinct sales orders, and gross profit by product category. Return columns: Channel, Category, revenue, channel_revenue_share_pct, cumulative_channel_revenue_share_pct, orders, gross_profit. Sort by Channel ascending, then revenue descending, then Category ascending.
results.sql: WITH grouped AS ( SELECT SO."Channel", P."Category", SUM(S."Sales Amount") AS revenue, COUNT(DISTINCT SO."Sales Order") AS orders, SUM(S."Sales Amount" - S."Total Product Cost") AS gross_profit FROM "Sales" S JOIN "Sales_Order" SO ON S."SalesOrderLineKey" = SO."SalesOrderLineKey" JOIN "Product" P ON S."ProductKey" = P."ProductKey" GROUP BY SO."Channel", P."Category" ) SELECT "Channel", "Category", revenue, (revenue / SUM(revenue) OVER (PARTITION BY "Channel")) * 100 AS channel_revenue_share_pct, (SUM(revenue) OVER (PARTITION BY "Channel" ORDER BY revenue DESC, "Category" ASC ROWS BETWEEN UNBOUNDED PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW) / SUM(revenue) OVER (PARTITION BY "Channel")) * 100 AS cumulative_channel_revenue_share_pct, orders, gross_profit FROM grouped ORDER BY "Channel" ASC, revenue DESC, "Category" ASC

results.question: For each territory group and fiscal year, show the top sales channel by revenue, along with that channel's revenue, the total revenue for the group-year, and the channel's share of the group-year revenue. Return columns: Group, Fiscal Year, top_channel, channel_revenue, group_year_revenue, channel_revenue_share_pct. Sort by Group, then Fiscal Year ascending.
results.sql:
WITH channel_rev AS (
SELECT
st."Group" AS grp,
d."Fiscal Year" AS fy,
so."Channel" AS ch,
SUM(s."Sales Amount") AS crev
FROM "Sales" s
JOIN "Sales_Territory" st ON s."SalesTerritoryKey" = st."SalesTerritoryKey"
JOIN "Date" d ON s."OrderDateKey" = d."DateKey"
JOIN "Sales_Order" so ON s."SalesOrderLineKey" = so."SalesOrderLineKey"
GROUP BY grp, fy, ch
),
total_rev AS (
SELECT
grp,
fy,
SUM(crev) AS trev
FROM channel_rev
GROUP BY grp, fy
),
ranked AS (
SELECT
cr.grp,
cr.fy,
cr.ch,
cr.crev,
tr.trev,
(cr.crev / tr.trev) * 100 AS share_pct,
ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY cr.grp, cr.fy ORDER BY cr.crev DESC) AS rn
FROM channel_rev cr
JOIN total_rev tr ON cr.grp = tr.grp AND cr.fy = tr.fy
)
SELECT
grp AS "Group",
fy AS "Fiscal Year",
ch AS top_channel,
crev AS channel_revenue,
trev AS group_year_revenue,
share_pct AS channel_revenue_share_pct
FROM ranked
WHERE rn = 1
ORDER BY "Group" ASC, "Fiscal Year" ASC
